brief: Design a small 5 V logic I/O module with a microcontroller, a momentary pushbutton input, and a status LED with series resistor. Allow different MCU families (8-bit AVR or 32-bit ARM Cortex-M). Everything must be sourced from Mouser. The board should run from a regulated 5 V rail (4.75–5.25 V tolerance). Provide attributes to note whether the MCU, LED+resistor, and button are present. Keep the SysML minimal but compilable.
